---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for ccview
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem would this solve?**
A clear description of the use case.

**Proposed solution**
What you would like ccview to do (a new flag, output mode, etc.).

**Alternatives considered**
Any workarounds you currently use.

**Additional context**
Anything else relevant.
